name: per-lens role-play
prompt: Review the requirement as the accountable role for each Ignite lens: operator, auditor, designer, engineer, tester, delivery lead, and business owner.

calibration.business: Use business-facing wording: outcomes, policy, users, acceptance, and decision ownership; avoid implementation jargon.
calibration.technical: Use technical wording: data contracts, interfaces, constraints, failure modes, observability, and implementation surfaces.

evidence_contract: Every finding must cite a verbatim local evidence fragment and declare the Ignite lens it belongs to.
output_focus: question for client or domain owner
